text.title: llamaindex-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for llamaindex-basics with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.symptom: Index loses all data after restart
antipattern.root-cause: Defaulted to in-memory VectorStoreIndex; never persisted.
Default chunk_size=1024 split documents far smaller than needed; over-embedded.
antipattern.fix: Tune node_parser.chunk_size to document shape; coarser for narrative, finer for technical.
antipattern.detector: Plot tokens-embedded vs doc-bytes; ratio should be <2.

antipattern.root-cause: No metadata extractor; can't filter or rerank by source.
antipattern.fix: Add TitleExtractor + SummaryExtractor in the ingestion pipeline so retrieval has handles.
antipattern.detector: Query for a known fact; if missed, add metadata.

antipattern.symptom: Initial build takes 4 hours and OOM-kills
antipattern.root-cause: Loaded all docs into memory before chunking.
antipattern.fix: Use IngestionPipeline with batching; persist incrementally.
antipattern.detector: Run with /usr/bin/time -v; if peak RSS exceeds limits, switch to pipeline.
